questions.question: Does the leaderboard page aggregate quiz points across all selected topics?
questions.actionable_check: Check leaderboard.tsx reads readSelectedTopics().slugs and sums quizPoints from readProgress()
questions.pass_criteria: Total points = sum of quizPoints for all selected topic slugs

questions.question: Does the user appear as 'You (1/1)' in the leaderboard?
questions.actionable_check: Check LeaderboardEntry renders label='You (1/1)' with isYou=true styling
questions.pass_criteria: Entry shows rank 1, label 'You (1/1)', highlighted with teal styling

questions.question: Is there an empty state when no topics are selected?
questions.actionable_check: Check leaderboard-no-topics alert rendered when selectedCount === 0
questions.pass_criteria: leaderboard-no-topics alert visible with link to topics page

questions.question: Is there a streak display showing days of study activity?
questions.actionable_check: Check streak-display element exists and calculateStreak returns 0 when no sessions
questions.pass_criteria: streak-display shows 0 when no sessions, increments for consecutive study days

questions.question: Does the rank display show 1/1 always (single-user app)?

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 5 Story 07 E2E tests pass?
Do all prior story tests still pass (no regressions)?
